notes: buildx bake of the integration-tests target failed at build step #72 [nydus 1/2] because the `RUN wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/...` line at Dockerfile:336 received HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway from github.com. flaky_or_transient = true (transient github outage; the Dockerfile itself is correct). Failure block sits at lines ~1853-1901 of 3979 (signal_position=middle, ~48%) — meaningful because tail-200 won't catch it.
